hooks.command: python -c "import json,sys,subprocess,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command','') or ''; root=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR','.'); (sys.exit(subprocess.call(['bash', os.path.join(root,'scripts','check-no-secrets.sh')], cwd=root))) if cmd.lstrip().startswith('git commit') else None"

python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','') or ''; msgs=[]; msgs.append('\u2192 Alert engine changed. Run /test-alerts before committing.') if 'src/lib/alert-engines/' in p and p.endswith('.ts') else None; msgs.append('\u2192 Cron route changed. Verify validateCronSecret() + withErrorReporting() (.claude/rules/cron-security.md).') if '/api/cron/' in p and p.endswith('route.ts') else None; msgs.append('\u2192 Indexes changed. Use /deploy-indexes to diff before deploying.') if p.endswith('firestore.indexes.json') else None; msgs.append('\u2192 Channel service changed. Consider running /audit-parity.') if p.endswith('-service.ts') and 'src/lib/' in p else None; print('\n'.join(m for m in msgs if m), file=sys.stderr) if any(msgs) else None"

python -c "import json,sys,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','') or ''; (subprocess.call(['node','scripts/check-error-reporting.js',p])) if (('/src/app/api/' in p.replace('\\','/')) and (p.endswith('route.ts') or p.endswith('route.tsx'))) else None"

python -c "import json,sys,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','') or ''; (subprocess.call(['node','scripts/check-no-new-any.js',p])) if (p.endswith('.ts') or p.endswith('.tsx')) else None"

python -c "import json,sys,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','') or ''; r=(subprocess.run(['node','scripts/check-cron-doc-sync.js'],capture_output=True,text=True) if p.endswith('crons.yml') else None); (sys.stderr.write(r.stderr) if (r and r.returncode!=0) else None)"

python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','') or ''; crit=['objective-utils.ts','date-utils.ts','cron-auth.ts']; print('\u2192 Critical utility changed. Run npm run test:unit to verify pure function tests.', file=sys.stderr) if any(c in p for c in crit) else None"
